hero.heading: Elevating local business through <gradient>intelligent software.</gradient>
hero.subheading: We build bespoke SaaS and automation platforms tailored to streamline your operations, save time, and dramatically boost your sales.

bento.heading: SaaS built for your industry.
bento.subheading: Powerful, dedicated software platforms customized to the unique needs of local businesses and entrepreneurial workflows.
bento.spaDescription: End-to-end management tools designed exclusively for spa operations. Streamline bookings, manage staff schedules, and handle client data securely in one place.
bento.nutritionDescription: A comprehensive platform for dietitians to manage patient profiles, create custom meal plans, and track progress seamlessly.
bento.restaurantDescription: Digital presence and operational management built for the modern restaurant. Boost visibility and handle orders gracefully.
bento.iximchatDescription: An AI-powered digital assistant for agriculture and farming cooperatives. Record data, analyze crop trends, and make decisions directly from WhatsApp—no new apps required.

automatizations.label: Automatizations
automatizations.heading: We connect the dots so your business runs on autopilot.
automatizations.chatbotsDescription: Deploy 24/7 AI agents that handle customer inquiries, book appointments, and close sales seamlessly on WhatsApp, Instagram, and web.
automatizations.omnichannelDescription: Unify your communications. Connect WhatsApp, Messenger, and Instagram DMs into a single dashboard so no lead ever slips through.
automatizations.crmDescription: Automate your entire sales pipeline. From lead generation to nurturing sequences, we build precise workflows that convert visitors into loyal clients.

philosophy.quote: "Technology should empower the local community, not overwhelm it."
philosophy.heading: We are building for <red>our people.</red>
philosophy.p1: At Koi Software, we don't believe in generic, one-size-fits-all solutions. Our foundation is built on deep integration with local businesses and entrepreneurs.
philosophy.p2: You manage the people, we manage the data. By streamlining operations and opening powerful digital channels, we help you provide superior service to your clients.
philosophy.p3: When local businesses thrive, the whole community scales. That's why we build software that is accessible, beautiful, and relentlessly reliable.

consulting.heading: Beyond the platform.
consulting.subheading: Need something completely unique? Our custom consulting and development services bridge the gap between where you are and where you want to go.
consulting.accessoriesDescription: Custom bridges, webhooks, and add-ons built specifically for your existing software infrastructure.
consulting.optimizationDescription: We analyze your technical debt and workflows to dramatically speed up and secure your current operations.
consulting.tailoredDescription: Zero compromises. Complete architectural design and implementation of bespoke software for distinct business models.

footer.heading: Ready to scale your business?
footer.subheading: Drop us a line and let's discuss how customized software and automation can accelerate your growth.
footer.tagline: Designed and built locally, for our people.
